new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung Electronics shares rise as robotics move highlights push into physical AI'이다. Samsung Electronics shares rose as the company set up a robotics division in a push into physical AI. , China and Japan The Samsung Electronics Co signage at the company's Seocho office building in Seoul, South Korea, on Monday, June 29, 2026 Creation of the entity highlights a push into physical AI Earlier this month, Roh said at a public briefing in Jinju that Samsung Electronics plans to invest around 60 trillion won ($40 7 billion) in the Yeongnam region, which includes its Gumi site. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Samsung Electronics creates robotics division; ex-Hyundai executive to head strategy
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, Hyundai Motor 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung Electronics creates robotics division; ex-Hyundai executive to head strategy'이다. The ‌South Korean ⁠conglomerate said ⁠the RX, or "Robotics eXperience", division will oversee its mid-to-long-term robotics ​strategy, core technology development and business execution, while expanding research capabilities ​at home and overseas. Listen to this article in summarized format Samsung Electronics ​said on Tuesday ​it will set up a robotics division ​reporting directly to the chief executive to accelerate development and commercialisation in the field and establish robotics as a growth engine The ‌South Korean ⁠conglomerate said ⁠the RX, or "Robotics eXperience", division will oversee its mid-to-long-term robotics ​strategy, core technology development and business execution, while expanding research capabilities ​at home and overseas Lee previously led robotics strategy ⁠at Hyundai ‌Motor Group, including the direction of Boston Dynamics Samsung ​also said it plans to establish robotics ⁠research hubs in the U , China and ​Japan, where robotics technology is advancing rapidly, ​to strengthen competitiveness by leveraging local ecosystems and expertise. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Samsung Electronics creates robotics division as key part of growth strategy
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung Electronics creates robotics division as key part of growth strategy'이다. Channel NewsAsia is an English-language news organization based in Singapore. SEOUL, July 21 : Samsung Electronics said on Tuesday it will set up a robotics division reporting directly to the chief executive to accelerate development and commercialisation in the field and establish robotics as a growth engine. The South Korean conglomerate said the RX, or "Robotics eXperience", division. Get bite-sized news via a new cards interface Give it a try Click here to return to FAST Tap here to return to FAST FAST SEOUL, July 21 : Samsung Electronics said on Tuesday it will set up a robotics division reporting directly to the chief executive to accelerate development and commercialisation in the field and establish robotics as a growth engine The South Korean conglomerate said the RX, or "Robotics eXperience", division will oversee its mid-to-long-term robotics strategy, core technology development and business execution, while expanding research capabilities at home and overseas. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Game giant Nexon's shares drop despite success of ARC Raiders
matched_articles.summary: Nexon 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Game giant Nexon's shares drop despite success of ARC Raiders'이다. Struggles in Western markets, China slowdown have tempered market expectations. TOKYO -- Video game company Nexon, founded in South Korea and headquartered in Japan, faces growing pains as its Chinese and South Korean businesses. Media & Entertainment Game giant Nexon's shares drop despite success of ARC Raiders Struggles in Western markets, China slowdown have tempered market expectations ARC Raiders was released in the autumn of 2025 (Nexon) NORIKA TAGUCHI July 21, 2026 07:34 JST TOKYO -- Video game company Nexon, founded in South Korea and headquartered in Japan, faces growing pains as its Chinese and South Korean businesses show signs of slowing but its long-sought expansion into Western markets remains incomplete. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Hyundai Motor India integrates 30,000 EV charging points into myHyundai app
matched_articles.summary: Hyundai Motor 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Hyundai Motor India integrates 30,000 EV charging points into myHyundai app'이다. Hyundai Motor India plans to more than triple its proprietary fast-charging network to 600 stations by 2030 and launch a mass-market electric SUV this financial year. Hyundai Motor India integrates 30,000 EV charging points into myHyundai app Hyundai Motor India plans to more than triple its proprietary fast-charging network to 600 stations by 2030 and launch a mass-market electric SUV this financial year By BL Chennai Bureau Updated - July 20, 2026 at 07:20 PM com/companies/hyundai-motor-india-integrates-30000-ev-charging-points-into-myhyundai-app/article71244655 ece Tarun Garg, MD & CEO, HMIL Hyundai Motor India Limited (HMIL) on Monday announced a significant milestone in its electric vehicle (EV) ecosystem journey, offering access to over 30,000 EV charging points across India through its myHyundai app This platform is being set up in partnership with leading CPOs and service providers Tarun Garg, MD & CEO, HMIL, in a release, said with charging infrastructure being a key catalyst for EV adoption in India, HMIL is committed to creating an ecosystem that makes electric mobility practical, convenient and accessible to all. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: 'Give me my money back': South Korean traders' leveraged SK Hynix, Samsung bets unravel after sell-off
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 ''Give me my money back': South Korean traders' leveraged SK Hynix, Samsung bets unravel after sell-off'이다. South Korean retail investors suffer heavy losses after Samsung and SK Hynix shares reverse sharply. The pain has been especially acute for holders of single-stock leveraged exchange-traded funds tied to chip giants Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix, which had surged alongside the AI-driven semiconductor rally, and have now tumbled The KODEX SK Hynix Single Stock Leverage ETF — a product designed to deliver twice the daily move in SK Hynix shares — has fallen about 70% from its record high reached in June and is down roughly 50% from its debut, according to LSEG data South Korean online trading forums were full of lament, especially after SK Hynix's record one-day plunge last week South Korea on Thursday unveiled tougher rules for single-stock leveraged exchange-traded funds , seeking to curb speculative retail trading after sharp swings in Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix Under the new measures, investors will need to post a minimum 30 million won in cash to trade the products, up from an effective minimum of 3 million won previously. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Tata Osprey joins Maruti Across and Toyota Urban Cruiser as India-made cars go global
matched_articles.summary: Nexon 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Tata Osprey joins Maruti Across and Toyota Urban Cruiser as India-made cars go global'이다. The India-made Tata Nexon will be sold in South Africa as the Osprey from Q3 2026, joining several locally manufactured models rebranded for global markets. com/companies/tata-osprey-joins-maruti-across-and-toyota-urban-cruiser-as-india-made-cars-go-global/article71244410 ece The move reflects a broader trend of Indian-made vehicles being rebadged and adapted for global markets Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles will sell its India-made Nexon in South Africa as the Tata Osprey from the third quarter of 2026, giving the compact SUV a market-specific identity as the company rebuilds its passenger-vehicle presence in the country The move, inspired by the osprey, found in parts of South Africa, is more than a name change: the Nexon, which Tata says has crossed one million customers globally, reflects how vehicles developed or manufactured in India are increasingly being adapted for overseas markets through local branding, alliance partnerships and market-specific equipment The South African version will retain the Nexon’s core product identity Tata’s announcement does not specify whether the Osprey will receive changes to its equipment, powertrain, suspension or safety specification. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Samsung, SK Hynix advance new memory layer to tackle AI scaling limits
matched_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung, SK Hynix advance new memory layer to tackle AI scaling limits'이다. Samsung Electronics and SK hynix pushed to commercialise a new class of memory as artificial intelligence outgrew high-bandwidth memory alone, according to a news report by The Korea Herald. Listen to this article in summarized format ANI Samsung, SK Hynix advance new memory layer to tackle AI scaling limits Samsung Electronics and SK hynix pushed to commercialise a new class of memory as artificial intelligence outgrew high-bandwidth memory alone, according to a news report by The Korea Herald SK hynix demonstrated its progress at the HPE Discover conference in Las Vegas in June, displaying a second-generation 256-gigabyte CMM-DDR5 sample based on CXL 3 SK hynix established no production timeline In performance tests on July 9, Samsung reported that a 1-terabyte CXL memory pool achieved roughly 92 per cent of DRAM-level inference performance across eight GPUs while storing larger caches Similarly, SK hynix researchers published work in June showing up to a 35. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: China's CXMT targets global DRAM giants with record $8.5 billion IPO
matched_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'China's CXMT targets global DRAM giants with record $8.5 billion IPO'이다. Chinese DRAM maker ChangXin Memory Technologies is throwing its hat into the ring with a roughly $8. 5 billion initial public offering as it seeks to challenge the dominance of Samsung Electronics, SK hynix and Micron Technology, The Korea Herald reported. 5 billion initial public offering as it seeks to challenge the dominance of Samsung Electronics, SK hynix and Micron Technology, The Korea Herald reported 5 billion initial public offering as it seeks to challenge the dominance of Samsung Electronics , SK hynix and Micron Technology , The Korea Herald reported Samsung Electronics, SK hynix and Micron held 38 percent, 29 percent and 22 percent, respectively, in the latest quarter CXMT's chips are estimated to be 5 to 10 percent cheaper than those of Samsung, SK hynix and Micron, potentially attracting more buyers as supplies tighten The gap is wider in high-bandwidth memory, the key AI chip component driving profits at Samsung, SK hynix and Micron. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Continental AG-Spun-Off Aumovio India eyes 45% revenue jump in FY27 on safety and software push
matched_articles.summary: Hyundai Motor, Kia 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Continental AG-Spun-Off Aumovio India eyes 45% revenue jump in FY27 on safety and software push'이다. Aumovio India, collaborating with OEMs like Tata Motors, Mahindra & Mahindra, and Hyundai-Kia, aims to surpass an automotive market growing at about 8%. This is after revenue expanded 29 5 per cent in FY26, as vehicle makers add more safety, software and central-computing systems Aumovio India, which works with OEMs including Tata Motors, Mahindra & Mahindra and Hyundai-Kia, is seeking to outpace an automotive market growing at around 8 per cent Despite a 5 per cent decline in global sales, Aumovio lifted adjusted operating profit 45 4 per cent in FY25 by shifting towards higher-value electronics and software. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Samsung cuts US jobs, offers relocations ahead of headquarters move
matched_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Samsung cuts US jobs, offers relocations ahead of headquarters move'이다. Samsung Electronics has cut jobs at its U. S. display, phone and other consumer electronics operations, affecting workers mainly in New Jersey and Texas, according to documents and two people familiar with the matter. Make VnExpress a preferred source to prioritise our updates in your Google search results Samsung Electronics has cut jobs at its U The South Korean tech giant said in a statement to Reuters that 739 roles in Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey, have been affected by plans by Samsung Electronics America (SEA) – which focuses on consumer electronics and does not include chips – to move its headquarters to Texas A Samsung Electronics logo and a computer motherboard appear in this illustration taken Aug The relocation of the unit's headquarters is intended to foster "stronger collaboration and optimize the organization by bringing more teams together within a growing technology and AI ecosystem," the company said Samsung Electronics had 11,770 employees in the United States as of the end of 2025, including workers in its chip division. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
